# MVP_SCOPE.md

## In Scope
- one semester
- one campus map
- top-down movement
- simple NPC roaming and interaction
- 3 short courses
- course progress tracking
- player stats
- final project progress
- final export screen

## Out of Scope
- multiple semesters
- multiple maps
- online accounts
- cloud saves
- multiplayer
- voice features
- deep dialogue generation
- complex economies
- combat
- quest trees
- procedural world generation

## MVP Success Criteria
The MVP is successful if:
1. the player can walk around the world
2. the player can enter learning interactions
3. the player can complete all 3 courses
4. NPCs appear alive through movement and behavior
5. the semester can end
6. the player receives a GitHub-ready project package
